statement.en: Advancing equity, diversity, and inclusion in arthritis research : a mixed-methods exploration of strategies for improvement and integration
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission is an embargo-restricted thesis with abstract content unavailable for evaluation. No evaluable propositional content is accessible; the axiom cannot be assessed without the full text. This is an observation-impossible condition under current access constraints.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 見えない声の逆数和が、統合された重みの積分を通じて、可視性へと変わる。
